subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-11-22
subcodes.first_line: In these days the most important affair is to render a worthy service at the Holy Divine Threshold and this is no other but the guidance of the people of the earth.
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @idolatry, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East
